widgets_values: Transform the original flat badge artwork into a realistic photographed metal enamel badge. Preserve the original design layout, circular silhouette, blue center, gold rim, curved top horn, orbit lines, planet, stars, golden decorative details, and the text “2026 ASTEROID XXXII”. Convert gold regions into raised polished metal with rounded bevels, realistic thickness, highlights, shadows, and engraved depth. Keep blue regions as glossy recessed enamel. Use the depth guide reference to control relief height: brighter depth areas should appear more raised, darker areas should remain lower or flat. Maintain clean edges and accurate alignment. Do not redesign, do not add or remove symbols, do not change the text.

Convert gold regions into raised polished metal with rounded bevels, realistic thickness, highlights, shadows, and engraved depth. Keep blue regions as glossy recessed enamel. Use the depth guide reference to control relief height: brighter depth areas should appear more raised, darker areas should remain lower or flat. Maintain clean edges and accurate alignment. Do not redesign, do not add or remove symbols, do not change the text.
